content: Ice Mage Adept: You trespass upon my domain, foolish whelp. The cold embrace of my magic will be the last thing you feel before your pathetic body shatters like brittle ice. Lydia: Hah! Your frosty little spells won't stop me from splitting your skull open, you pointy-eared bastard. My thane's cock has made me hotter than any of your weak magic ever could. Ice Mage Adept: Such vulgarity from a brute who relies on steel rather than true power. Tell me, does your so-called Dragonborn master enjoy rutting with simple-minded nords who can't even conjure a simple flame? Lydia: Fuck your magic, elf! MJR's fat cock conjures more pleasure than your entire pathetic order could dream of. And when I'm done with you, I'll ride him right here in your frozen shithole of a keep. Ice Mage Adept: How amusing. While you were busy spreading your legs for some barbarian, I was mastering the arcane arts. Your primitive kind will never understand true power. Lydia: Power? You call hiding in ruins like a scared skeever power? Real power is feeling MJR's seed pumping deep inside me while I watch him put an arrow through the skulls of your Thalmor friends.
